claim: Current scalar LOG_AGE summaries help nonlinear models in some grouped views, but gains are mixed
primary_metric: HGB F3->F4 mean gain 0.000085; positive rows 10/20
allowed_wording: Current scalar LOG_AGE summaries help nonlinear models in some grouped views, but gains are mixed.
blocked_wording: LOG_AGE scalar summaries broadly solve operating-history generalization.

claim: LOG_AGE stress features solve C-rate fade prediction
primary_metric: C-rate delta best stress MAE 0.102516 vs F4 0.101133
allowed_wording: Stress features improved some folds but did not solve C-rate delta_capacity_Ah.
blocked_wording: LOG_AGE stress features solve C-rate fade prediction.

claim: C-rate holdout is the hardest capacity generalization view
primary_metric: Best C-rate capacity_Ah_k1 MAE 0.125186 and delta MAE 0.101133 remain high
allowed_wording: C-rate holdout is the dominant unresolved capacity generalization stressor.
blocked_wording: The model generalizes uniformly across stressor holdouts.

claim: PULSE RT/50 is usable as scalar resistance endpoint
primary_metric: Canonical RT/50 target robustness and delta_pulse_1s_resistance C-rate MAE 0.00185842
allowed_wording: Canonical RT/50 PULSE is robust enough for scalar resistance-baseline diagnostics.
blocked_wording: PULSE target robustness proves broad multimodal degradation modeling.

primary_metric: C-rate interval abs residual correlations: capacity Pearson 0.857653; delta Pearson 0.647125
allowed_wording: PULSE growth is associated with capacity residual magnitude, especially in C-rate views.
blocked_wording: PULSE growth is causal or independently sufficient after all confounds.

claim: Prior PULSE improves capacity-level prediction over F4
primary_metric: capacity_Ah_k1 gains vs F4: C-rate 0.00669208; temperature 0.00509620; profile 0.0214905
allowed_wording: Prior PULSE state improves capacity_Ah_k1 over F4 in selected grouped splits.
blocked_wording: Prior PULSE improves all capacity targets or all splits.

claim: Prior PULSE beats strongest supplied non-PULSE capacity baseline
primary_metric: C-rate capacity_Ah_k1 gain 0.000392605 with p05 -0.00553843; temperature/profile mean gains negative
allowed_wording: Prior PULSE improves over F4, but not over the strongest supplied non-PULSE HGB baselines.
blocked_wording: Prior PULSE is the best available non-neural capacity feature path.

primary_metric: C-rate delta gain vs strongest non-PULSE -0.00234428; gain vs F4 -0.00574230
allowed_wording: delta_capacity_Ah remains an unresolved guardrail limitation.
Quantile metrics are diagnostics only until calibration is tested.
blocked_wording: HGB quantile intervals are calibrated uncertainty estimates.

primary_metric: EIS coverage exists but valid-frequency QA and predictive tests are pending
allowed_wording: EIS remains gated and untested for predictive claims.

primary_metric: Simpler baselines and evidence synthesis have not authorized architecture work
allowed_wording: CBAT remains a reserved late-stage architecture label.
blocked_wording: CBAT is justified by current baseline evidence.

claim: Grouped condition validation is required for publishable evidence
primary_metric: All headline reports use condition/stressor grouped splits and parameter-set condition aggregation
allowed_wording: Headline claims must use grouped validation and replicate-aware condition summaries.
blocked_wording: Random row or cell splits are publishable evidence.
